examples.title: Algorithm: Process Synchronization with wait3
examples.description: Basic workflow for parent-child process synchronization using wait3
examples.code:
ALGORITHM Wait3Workflow
BEGIN
 1. Create child process using fork()
 2. IF fork returns 0:
 a. Execute child operations
 b. Exit with status code
 3. ELSE IF fork returns >0:
 a. Parent calls wait3() with rusage pointer
 b. Check process termination status using WIFEXITED/WEXITSTATUS
 c. Analyze resource usage from rusage structure
 4. ELSE:
 a. Handle fork error
END
examples.explanation:
1. fork() creates child process
3a. wait3() blocks until child exits
3b. WIFEXITED checks normal termination
3c. rusage contains CPU times and memory usage

examples.title: Basic wait3 Usage with Resource Monitoring
examples.description: Demonstrates waiting for child process and printing resource usage statistics
examples.explanation:
1. fork() creates child process
2. Child sleeps and exits with status 42
3. wait3() blocks until child termination
4. WIFEXITED checks normal exit
5. Prints user/system CPU times from rusage

examples.title: Non-blocking Wait with WNOHANG
examples.description: Using wait3 with WNOHANG option to check child status without blocking
examples.explanation:
1. Uses WNOHANG to prevent blocking
2. Polls child status in loop
3. Sleeps between checks
4. Final wait3 returns when child exits

examples.title: Multiple Child Process Management
examples.description: Handling multiple child processes with wait3 in loop
examples.explanation:
1. Creates 3 children with different sleep durations
2. Parent waits for all children in loop
3. wait3 returns PID of each exiting child
4. Prevents zombie processes
